// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

// POSTPageLoginSubmit references /login/submit/
func POSTPageLoginSubmit() string {
	return "@post('/login/submit/')"
}

// POSTPageSettingsSave references /settings/save/
func POSTPageSettingsSave() string {
	return "@post('/settings/save/')"
}
